name: @elide-dev/format
description: GitHub Action to check source formatting using Elide
author: Elide Team (https://elide.dev)

scripts.bundle: bun run format:write && bun run package
scripts.test: rm -rf coverage && bun test __tests__/command.test.ts && cp coverage/lcov.info coverage/batch1.info && bun test __tests__/telemetry.test.ts && cp coverage/lcov.info coverage/batch2.info && bun test __tests__/main.test.ts && cp coverage/lcov.info coverage/batch3.info && bun test __tests__/options.test.ts __tests__/index.test.ts && cp coverage/lcov.info coverage/batch4.info && cat coverage/batch*.info > coverage/lcov.info
scripts.test:ci: rm -rf coverage test-results && mkdir -p test-results && bun test --reporter=junit --reporter-outfile=test-results/batch1.xml __tests__/command.test.ts && cp coverage/lcov.info coverage/batch1.info && bun test --reporter=junit --reporter-outfile=test-results/batch2.xml __tests__/telemetry.test.ts && cp coverage/lcov.info coverage/batch2.info && bun test --reporter=junit --reporter-outfile=test-results/batch3.xml __tests__/main.test.ts && cp coverage/lcov.info coverage/batch3.info && bun test --reporter=junit --reporter-outfile=test-results/batch4.xml __tests__/options.test.ts __tests__/index.test.ts && cp coverage/lcov.info coverage/batch4.info && cat coverage/batch*.info > coverage/lcov.info
scripts.test:docker: docker build -t format-test . && docker run --rm format-test sh -c 'bun run build && bun run test'
scripts.all: bun run format:write && bun run build && bun run test
